detail.description:
The Evil Void tears the continent asunder, while the Undead Plague devours the last remnants of civilization! In this dual apocalypse, only the worthy shall rebuild the realm!

To survive this cataclysm, you must master both strategic command and survival instinct! 

Here's a tip for champions: True power lies not in brute strength, but in forging unbreakable bonds with your companions. Assemble your fellowship wisely - their lineage holds the key to victory.

Highlighted Features:

- Brand new
